## Meeting Purpose

[Align team on new content creation workflow (V2) and establish unified guidelines for all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New V2 workflow implemented with improved keyword research, outline generation, and content output](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Focus on concise, user-friendly content with actionable headings, bullet points, and relevant internal/external links](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Writers encouraged to enhance outlines and content with additional research, while maintaining timely delivery](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Emphasis on getting to the point quickly, addressing user pain points, and optimizing for skimmability](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Topics

### V2 Workflow Overview

  - [New columns: company name, company about, brand guidelines (copy for each article)](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Six-step process: keyword research, title generation, outline generation, article generation, post-processing, internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Improved output: more internal/external links, better fact-checking, research depth](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Content Structure and Formatting

  - [Avoid walls of text; use short paragraphs (3-4 lines max) and bullet points](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Place "Benefits" sections near the end, not immediately after introduction](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Use action-oriented H2/H3 titles (e.g., "How to Implement" vs. "Implementing")](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [Avoid question-based headings; opt for declarative statements](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Include primary keyword in H2s where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Number steps or list items when applicable to improve readability](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### Outline Generation Best Practices

  - [Critical step for final article quality](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Adjust word counts for sections based on importance and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Add/remove H3s as needed; not all H2s require H3s](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Order sections logically based on user search intent and topic importance](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### Content Writing and Editing

  - [Craft concise, direct introductions (about 2-3 lines)](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Begin each section with a clear definition or main point](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Break up long paragraphs, add bullet points, and use bold text for emphasis](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Ensure internal link anchor text accurately reflects the linked page content](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Writers encouraged to conduct additional research (e.g., analyzing top-ranking articles for common H2s) to enhance content, time permitting](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)

### New Workflow Implementation

  - [V2 workflows to be used starting this week](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2320.0)
  - [Writers to expect new assignments using updated grids](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [Further guidelines and knowledge base to be added to Notion](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2347.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Writers to begin using V2 workflows for new assignments](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [Team to review upcoming Notion documentation on new guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2347.0)
  - [Future training sessions to be scheduled for more specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2347.0)
  - [Team members to direct any questions to managers or post in the writer-editor channel](https://fathom.video/share/o7jBgnAbF7Qzzp3LUq_8GYRLyZDkzvMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
